mapper.insert:
select seq_hotel_id.nextval from dual
insert into tbl_hotel (hotel_id, hotel_name, address, contact, hotel_desc, approve_status, active_yn, created_by) values (#{hotel_id}, #{hotel_name}, #{address}, #{contact}, #{hotel_desc}, #{approve_status}, #{active_yn}, #{created_by})
insert into HOTEL_IMAGE (image_id, fk_hotel_id, image_url, is_main, sort_order) values (SEQ_HOTEL_IMAGE.nextval, #{fk_hotel_id}, #{image_url}, #{is_main}, #{sort_order})
